calendar.matters:
Verified Probate Code Section 850 Petition For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of Personal Property
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared via zoom for Roderick Garcia and Donna Francisco Quicho (co-trustees).

Ms. Heiman stated the confirmation of the two bank accounts from Wells Fargo Bank. Verified probate code section 850 petition for order confirming etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
